_meta.doc: Learner-friendly default display ordering for the 106 N5 kanji. Sorted by stroke_count ascending, ties broken by Unicode codepoint ascending. The whitelist (data/n5_kanji_whitelist.json) keeps its author-curated order because downstream tools index into it as a positional array; this file provides the pedagogical alternative for surfaces that want a stable single-criterion order without re-sorting kanji.json on the client each load.
_meta.ordering_rule: sort by stroke_count asc, ties broken by Unicode codepoint asc
consumers: (optional) any future tool that wants a single canonical display order without referencing kanji.json directly
see_also: data/kanji.json (full per-kanji records — kanji.js sorts this client-side via Sort-by chip)
